overview.description: Under normal market conditions, the fund will invest substantially all of its assets in FLexible EXchange Options ("FLEX Options") that reference the price performance of the Invesco QQQ TrustSM?, Series 1 (the "Underlying ETF"). The fund is non-diversified.
